creator: ache@nagual.pp.ru
text:
On Fri, Aug 21, 1998 at 11:30:01AM -0700, Tim Vanderhoek wrote:
>  +++ /usr/ports/textproc/catdoc.new/patches/patch-aa	Fri Aug 21 09:56:53 1998
>  @@ -1,43 +1,8 @@
>  -*** catdoc.c.bak	Fri Jun  5 14:43:35 1998
>  ---- catdoc.c	Fri Jul 24 16:02:09 1998
>  -***************
>  -*** 116,130 ****
>  -  0x50,0x51,0x52,0x53,0x54,0x55,0x56,0x57,0x58,0x59,0x5A,0x5B,0x5C,0x5D,0x5E,0x5F,
>  -  0x60,0x61,0x62,0x63,0x64,0x65,0x66,0x67,0x68,0x69,0x6A,0x6B,0x6C,0x6D,0x6E,0x6F,
>  -  0x70,0x71,0x72,0x73,0x74,0x75,0x76,0x77,0x78,0x79,0x7A,0x7B,0x7C,0x7D,0x7E,0x7F,
>  
>  Are you sure this patch is no longer necessary?  If you're not
>  sure, you should talk to Andrey, ache@FreeBSD.ORG, since he was
>  the one who added it.

Yes, it isn't neccesary now, new catdoc uses Unicode decode tables.
